scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib check && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app check
scripts.changeset-publish: node -e "if (!process.env.NPM_TOKEN) { console.log('Skipping publish: NPM_TOKEN is not set'); process.exit(0); }" && changeset publish
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app dev
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib lint && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app lint
scripts.lint:tests: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib lint:tests && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app lint:tests
scripts.lint:effect: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib lint:effect && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app lint:effect
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib test && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app typecheck
scripts.start: corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/lib build && corepack pnpm --filter @effect-template/app start
